name: e2m
description: Typed Envelope/DurableTask/Transition/Team coordination over append-only JSONL — the e2m-mcp peer lane for the operational plan.
long_description: Exposes the e2m coordination substrate as typed MCP tools: envelope_write, envelope_read, task_transition, mailbox_send, mailbox_recv, mailbox_ack, agent_directory, team_dispatch. Operator is a first-class participant (mailbox + queue). Reads/writes only JSONL under the configured operational-plan DATA_DIR; nothing leaves the machine. Schema mirrors cowork/schemas/envelope.ts.

tools.name: envelope_write
tools.description: Append a typed DurableTask to its queue

tools.name: envelope_read
tools.description: Read a queue (latest-line-wins) with optional state filter

tools.name: mailbox_send
tools.description: Send a typed Envelope to an agent's mailbox

tools.name: mailbox_recv
tools.description: Read an agent's envelopes (optionally pending only)

tools.name: team_dispatch
tools.description: Fan one Envelope to every member of a team

data_dir.title: operational-plan e2m data dir
data_dir.description: Path to the operational-plan data root (mailbox/ + queues/ JSONL).
